summary: Performed a fresh-thread final audit of Zoffice rc3. Found one real packaging mismatch: the bundle manifest and filesystem included `contracts/mutual-acceptance-v2.0.0-rc3.json`, but the tarball omitted it because the contracts directory was filtered out wholesale during tar creation. Applied the minimum root-cause fix in `Zoffice/scripts/create_release_bundle.py`, rebuilt rc3, and re-verified that manifest, tarball, and filesystem now agree for the shipped surface.
checks_run: Read continuation brief, plan, status, meta, release-review, architecture-reconciliation, substrate-absorption-map, supersession-plan
Compared manifest file set vs tarball file set vs current filesystem state
Grep-checked version references across `Zoffice/` excluding release artifacts
issues_found: Packaging mismatch: `contracts/mutual-acceptance-v2.0.0-rc3.json` appeared in the bundle manifest and current filesystem but was missing from the tarball before the fix.
Historical `contracts/mutual-acceptance-v2.0.0-rc1.json` remains in the working tree, but this is an intentional non-shipped historical artifact and does not block review.
fix_applied: Updated `Zoffice/scripts/create_release_bundle.py` so `should_exclude()` does not exclude the `contracts/` directory itself during tar creation, while still filtering contract files to the version-specific contract for the selected release. Rebuilt `v2.0.0-rc3` after the patch.
broadcast: D4.1 final audit completed. One real rc3 packaging bug was found and minimally fixed: the release tarball had omitted the rc3 acceptance contract even though the manifest listed it. After rebuilding, manifest/tarball/filesystem now align at 102 shipped files, checksum verification passes, healthcheck passes, layer2 smoke test passes, and rc3 is honestly review-ready for closeout. Completed: final audit, root-cause fix, rebuild, re-verification. Remaining: none for this build. Status: 3/3 (100%).
